title: Ice Cream and Popsicles
description: A mod that adds Popsicles to the Game and later on Ice Cream! Also BRAINFREEZE when eating Popsicles sometimes!
body:
A mod that adds for the time Being Popsilces and later on also some Ice cream into the game!



[![Invite to Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaosMCC/Badges/3f0309b5353c217fd57912cbf0509b8f6d445fd4/discord.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/e5C2MUBndf)





![All the Juices and Popsicles added to the game!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62953253d376b2f4de1b0d13c16254b390c191e1.png)

Recipes!

![Recipe for Popsicle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90c04609c9f5a890d09218a4715b70d7a51d0806.png)

![Recipe for Ice Cubes!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54b7b7afa295111e02dc1edd8d599a0445992ef.png)

![Reverse Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbddd18ec3747460d397414b4c6492be1bb06b43.png)

![Popsicle with Flavor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e99c454193d186dcc2210836763c1da99d953b7.png)




We have also added a new Fruit cherrys that drop from Cherry Blossom Trees

![We have also added a new Fruit cherrys that drop from Cherry Blossom Trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9becd70c58bacf44f5036dfa656e83165cf6e74a.png)
